_provenance: 2026-07-19 session 019f6e76-5f8b-7633-8b19-d7cd457847fa; P-2026-044 and ADR 0013; owner portability correction
state_behavior: stateless read-only evidence; proposal preparation emits a diff and has no apply operation
explicit_repository_actions: prepare proposal diff for external review
optional_dependencies: Python 3.12 or newer for the deterministic local CLI
unsupported_cases: executing repository graders, tests, hooks, commands, binaries, or model prompts
model-backed eval replay without a reviewed host sandbox
full Recursive Cartograph dependency, lineage, or blast-radius semantics
automatic edits, comments, commits, pushes, pull requests, or remote review actions
malware scanning, secret scanning, full static analysis, or correctness certification

data_reads: repository file paths, sizes, and types
repository file paths, sizes, and types
eval case paths and bounded meta.json documents
one explicit confined target when it exists
